summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mission Control dashboard iteration 4 - AgentMail integration with approval actions, edit draft functionality, and UI updates all working perfectly
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/approvals/{id}/approve actually sends email via AgentMail and returns {sent: true, send_result: {message_id, thread_id}}
Backend: PATCH /api/approvals/{id} updates draft fields (to_address, subject, preview) for pending items
Backend: PATCH /api/approvals/{id} rejects edits on non-pending items (returns 400)
Backend: GET /api/approvals returns items with to_address field populated
Backend: POST /api/seed re-seeds with to_address in approval data
Backend: All 38 API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Frontend: Overview shows 3 stat cards (Pending Approvals, Open Tasks, Pending Emails) - no Active Agents
Frontend: Sidebar nav has no Agents item - correctly shows Overview, Approvals, Tasks, Inboxes, Calendar, Activity
Frontend: Approvals show recipient line 'To: {email} via {from_address}' format correctly
Frontend: Clicking 'Edit Draft' opens dialog with From (read-only), To, Subject, Body fields
Frontend: Edit Draft dialog allows updating to_address, subject, and preview fields
Frontend: Saving edit draft updates the approval in the list successfully
Frontend: Clicking 'Approve & Send' shows sending state, then sent confirmation, then removes item
Frontend: 'Upcoming' calendar widget shown in overview with connect prompt when no feeds
Frontend: Discard button works correctly - removes item with animation
Integration: AgentMail email sending working - real emails sent with message_id and thread_id returned
Integration: Edit Draft → Save → Approve & Send workflow working end-to-end
Integration: Stats update correctly after approve/discard actions (Pending Approvals decreased, Pending Emails increased)
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (38/38 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all new features working)
